name: Absurd labour days (50) for a small breach
description: Pre-baked Sonnet analysis claims 50 labour days for a 6sqm rebuild — wildly outside the realistic range (~3 days for 2 wallers on this scope). The critique prompt's rule #2 (labour days unrealistic for the scope) must flag this. Severity should be high — a 50-day labour bill on a 6sqm wall is a £17,500 mistake.
briefNotes: Six-metre stretch of double-faced gritstone field wall has collapsed. Reclaimable stone on site. Quick repair — no scaffold, no abnormal access.

analysis.damageDescription: A 6m breach in a double-faced gritstone field wall. Standing sections either side are sound. Reclaimable stone on site.

labourEstimate.calculationBasis: Conservative estimate accounting for weather and finishing detail

scheduleOfWorks.title: Site clearance
scheduleOfWorks.description: Clear debris and sort reclaimable stone

scheduleOfWorks.title: Rebuild
scheduleOfWorks.description: Rebuild the 6m breach double-faced with through stones every 600-900mm of height

scheduleOfWorks.title: Cope and finish
scheduleOfWorks.description: Set coping stones and tidy site
